---
title: "[Quarto Basics]{.clr-white .r-fit-text}"
subtitle: "[Dr. Ajay Kumar Koli $\\cdot$ 2nd SARA Bootcamp]{.clr-white .r-fit-text}"
#author: "[SARA Institute of Data Science, Sonipat, Haryana, India]{.clr-white .r-fit-text}"
logo: images/logo-sara.png
page-title: "Bootcamp"
format: revealjs
progress: true
controls: true
slide-number: true
scrollable: true
menu: true
theme: style.scss
transition: slide
lightbox: true
bibliography: references.bib
filters:
  - roughnotation
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1621947081720-86970823b77a?q=80&w=1932&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D"
  data-background-size: "cover"
  data-background-color: "black"
  data-background-opacity: "0.5"
---

## Quarto

<br>

::::: columns
::: {.column width="20%"}
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/explore/80f119e965a9a3df7b74c3f7b63a502e3d0ded36/topics/quarto/quarto.png)
:::

::: {.column width="80%"}
"An open-source scientific and technical publishing system to prepare articles & reports; presentations; dashboards; websites; books; and interactive documents.
:::
:::::

::: footer
Official Quarto Website: <https://quarto.org/>
:::

## Quarto BTS

![](https://cdn.myportfolio.com/45214904-6a61-4e23-98d6-b140f8654a40/b5217f2a-f129-4bf9-90dc-c5b9783d0ea8.png?h=f8d3ed40353f4ae6eb77dae39072510c)

::: footer
Artwork from [Allison Horst](https://allisonhorst.com/horst-hill-collaborations)
:::

# {background-image="https://cdn.myportfolio.com/45214904-6a61-4e23-98d6-b140f8654a40/b041d35c-5117-4dd0-9b08-d2d0f7a77f9a.png?h=21528b7e9f1a2e24c9ec3d46cfca8653" background-size="cover"}

::: footer
Artwork from [Allison Horst](https://allisonhorst.com/horst-hill-collaborations)
:::

## Create Quarto Document {.smaller}

::: {.centering layout-ncol=2 layout-valign="bottom"}

![Step 1](images/quarto-new-file.png){width="45%"}

![Step 2](images/quarto-new-document.png)

:::

## YAML {background-color="lightgray" auto-animate=true}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

```yaml
---
title: "Hello World"
subtitle: "2nd SARA Bootcamp 2026"
author: "Dr. Ajay Kumar Koli"
date: today
format: html
---

```

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

```{=html}
<iframe src="./_example1.html" width="100%" height="500"></iframe>
```

:::

::::

::: footer
More YAML options for HTML ouput <https://quarto.org/docs/reference/formats/html.html>
:::

## Markdown Syntax {background-color="lightgray" auto-animate=true}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

```yaml
---
title: "Hello World"
subtitle: "2nd SARA Bootcamp 2026"
author: "Dr. Ajay Kumar Koli"
date: today
format: html
---

## First Time Coding

- Relax

- Patience

## Having Fun

This is *just* the beginning. 
It will be **awesome** at the end. 
Learn more from this link <https://quarto.org/docs/reference/formats/html.html>.

## Add Image

![](images/intro/mission.jpg)

```

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

```{=html}
<iframe src="./_example-02.html" width="100%" height="500"></iframe>
```

:::

::::

::: footer
Markdown basics <https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/markdown-basics.html>
:::

## Code Blocks {background-color="lightgray" auto-animate=true} 

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="70%"}

````yaml
---
title: "ggplot2 demo"
author: "Norah Jones"
date: "5/22/2021"
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
---

## Air Quality

@fig-airquality further explores the impact of temperature on ozone level.

```{{r}}
#| label: fig-airquality
#| fig-cap: "Temperature and ozone level."
#| warning: false

library(ggplot2)

ggplot(airquality, aes(Temp, Ozone)) + 
  geom_point() + 
  geom_smooth(method = "loess")
```
````

:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

<iframe src="./_example-03.html" width="100%" height="500"></iframe>

:::

::::


::: footer
R Code Blocks <https://quarto.org/docs/computations/r.html>
:::

## Inline Code {background-color="lightgray" auto-animate=true}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="70%"}

````yaml
---
title: "Inline Coding"
date: "3/14/2026"
format: html
---

```{{r}}
marks <- c(2, 4, 6, 8)
```

The sum of the marks is `{{r}} sum(marks)`. 

The mean of the marks is `{{r}} mean(marks)`. 
````
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

<iframe src="./_example-04.html" width="100%" height="500"></iframe>

:::

::::

## Quarto Output Formats

::: {.panel-tabset}
### HTML

```yaml
---
title: "My document"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    html-math-method: katex
    css: styles.css
---
```

### PDF

```yaml
---
title: "My document"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
---
```

### WORD

```yaml
---
title: "My Document"
format:
  docx:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    highlight-style: github
---
```
:::

<br>

::: {.callout-caution}
Not all YAML options are supported across every output format.
:::

::: footer
More info <https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/all-formats.html>
:::
    
## 🤯 Your Turn {background-color="#003262"}

```{r}
library(countdown)

countdown(minutes = 15, top = 0)
```

![](images/turns/turn-01.png){fig-align=center width=40%}    

::: footer
This article webpage: <https://www.aljazeera.com/sports/2026/3/14/china-edge-taiwan-2-0-in-extra-time-to-reach-womens-asian-cup-semifinals>
:::

::: notes
Output in HTML, PDF, and Word.
:::
